Uses of Interface
org.moeaframework.core.EvolutionaryAlgorithm

Packages that use EvolutionaryAlgorithm
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation
Extends an algorithm with "continuations" or "restarts", where we periodically reseed an algorithm with random solutions and optionally adjust the settings.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.
org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.

  • Uses of EvolutionaryAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.algorithm

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm that implement EvolutionaryAlgorithm
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractEvolutionaryAlgorithm
    Abstract class providing default implementations for several EvolutionaryAlgorithm methods.
    class 
    AGEMOEAII
    Implementation of AGE-MOEA-II, which is an adaptive evolutionary algorithm that estimates the Pareto front geometry and uses this to score solutions during selection.
    class 
    DBEA
    Implementation of the Improved Decomposition-Based Evolutionary Algorithm (I-DBEA).
    class 
    EpsilonMOEA
    Implementation of the ε-MOEA algorithm.
    class 
    EpsilonNSGAII
    Implements the ε-NSGA-II algorithm.
    class 
    GDE3
    Implementation of the Generalized Differential Evolution (GDE3) algorithm.
    class 
    IBEA
    Implementation of the Indicator-Based Evolutionary Algorithm (IBEA).
    class 
    MSOPS
    Implementation of the Multiple Single Objective Pareto Sampling (MSOPS) algorithm.
    class 
    NSGAII
    Implementation of NSGA-II, with the ability to attach an optional ε-dominance archive.
    class 
    NSGAIII
    Implementation of NSGA-III.
    class 
    PAES
    Implementation of the (1+1) Pareto Archived Evolution Strategy (PAES).
    class 
    PESA2
    Implementation of the Pareto Envelope-based Selection Algorithm (PESA2).
    class 
    RVEA
    Implementation of the Reference Vector Guided Evolutionary Algorithm (RVEA).
    class 
    SMSEMOA
    Implementation of the S-metric Selection MOEA (SMS-MOEA).
    class 
    SPEA2
    Implementation of the strength-based evolutionary algorithm (SPEA2).
    class 
    UNSGAIII
    Implementation of the "unified" NSGA-III, or U-NSGA-III, which improves selection pressure by replacing the random selection of NSGA-III with tournament selection.
    class 
    VEGA
    Implementation of the Vector Evaluated Genetic Algorithm (VEGA).

  • Uses of EvolutionaryAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AdaptiveTimeContinuation
    Deprecated.
    Use AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension instead
    class 
    EpsilonProgressContinuation
    Deprecated.
    Use EpsilonProgressContinuationExtension instead

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected EvolutionaryAlgorithm
    AdaptiveTimeContinuation.getAlgorithm()
    Deprecated.
     
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation with parameters of type EvolutionaryAlgorithm
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AdaptiveTimeContinuation(EvolutionaryAlgorithm algorithm, int windowSize, int maxWindowSize, double injectionRate, int minimumPopulationSize, int maximumPopulationSize, Selection restartSelection, Variation restartVariation)
    Deprecated.
    Decorates the specified algorithm with adaptive time continuation.

  • Uses of EvolutionaryAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.algorithm.single

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm.single that implement EvolutionaryAlgorithm
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DifferentialEvolution
    Single-objective differential evolution (DE) algorithm.
    class 
    EvolutionStrategy
    Single-objective (mu + lambda) evolution strategy (ES) algorithm.
    class 
    GeneticAlgorithm
    Single-objective genetic algorithm (GA) implementation with elitism.
    class 
    SingleObjectiveEvolutionaryAlgorithm
    Abstract class for building single-objective evolutionary algorithms.

  • Uses of EvolutionaryAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.analysis.collector

    Constructors in org.moeaframework.analysis.collector with parameters of type EvolutionaryAlgorithm
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    PopulationCollector(EvolutionaryAlgorithm algorithm)
    Constructs a collector for recording the population from the specified EvolutionaryAlgorithm.
     
    PopulationSizeCollector(EvolutionaryAlgorithm algorithm)
    Constructs a collector for recording the population size and archive size, if available, from the specified EvolutionaryAlgorithm.

  • Uses of EvolutionaryAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.core

    Subinterfaces of EvolutionaryAlgorithm in org.moeaframework.core
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    EpsilonBoxEvolutionaryAlgorithm
    Interface for evolutionary algorithms using an ε-box dominance archive.
